summary: All four requirements (REQ-25, REQ-26, REQ-27, REQ-28) appear to be implemented. RegistrationPage.tsx was created with six fields and Holi theme styling. The /register route was added to App.tsx alongside all existing routes. A Register navigation link was added to Layout.tsx without removing existing links. The backend Registration type was updated to include mobileNumber and schoolName fields, and a migration module was added. Some modifications were made to files that were explicitly listed as off-limits.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle schema migration from old Registration records (with collegeOrSchool) to new records (with mobileNumber and schoolName), including backfilling existing data.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-28 only asked to ensure the backend type includes the required fields and did not request a migration module or data migration logic.

hallucinated_features.description: AdminDashboard.tsx was modified to use reg.schoolName and reg.mobileNumber and a Mobile column was added to the registrations table.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraints explicitly state not to alter AdminDashboard.tsx, and non-goals include any changes to the Admin Dashboard.

hallucinated_features.description: frontend/src/pages/StudentLogin.tsx was modified to remove the 'Register here' link.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraints state not to alter pages not directly related to the registration portal, and StudentLogin.tsx modification was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx CTA buttons were changed to navigate to live-classes and admin-login with student-login references removed.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Do not alter HomePage.tsx', making this an unsolicited modification.
